meaning: n.年长者,老人,父辈adj.年长的,资格老的,
examples: He is her elder by several years.
He had always been overshadowed by his elder sister.
His elder son was killed in a car crash a few years ago.
Nannup, the son of a Noongar elder, comes from a long line of experienced outdoorsmen.
The elder Herold, from Luray (population 194), plays at least twice a week in season.
